name: credchain
description: CredChain â€” a blockchain-powered universal credential network built on Solana. Multi-service monorepo (backend, frontend, ai-cv-engine, ai-insights-engine).
author: Ebukah Â· Tony Â· Zhavia Â· Kuro

scripts.demo: npm run freeports && npm run seed && concurrently -n backend,frontend,cv-engine,insights -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend" "npm:dev:cv" "npm:dev:insights"
scripts.demo:web: npm run freeports && npm run seed && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.dev: npm run freeports && npm run seed && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run freeports && npm run seed && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,cv-engine,insights -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend" "npm:dev:cv" "npm:dev:insights"
scripts.dev:v2: npm run freeports && npm run seed && concurrently -k -n backend,ccv2 -c blue,cyan "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:ccv2"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:python: pip install -r ai-cv-engine/requirements.txt && pip install -r ai-insights-engine/requirements.txt
